requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: Panama is a 60 Hz Americas-market electrical environment, so AC public and destination charging is likely to be specified around SAE J1772 Type 1, and DC fast charging is likely to be specified around CCS Combo 1 (CCS1), rather than the IEC Type 2 / CCS2 pattern used in many 50 Hz markets. This should be treated as a project assumption, not a blanket legal conclusion: exporters must confirm the connector required by ASEP, the distributor, the site owner, tender documents, or the charge-point operator. IEC connector standards remain useful references for dimensional compatibility and DC coupler families.
summary.zh: 巴拿马属于60 Hz美洲市场电气环境，因此公共及目的地交流充电较可能围绕SAE J1772 Type 1规定，直流快充较可能围绕CCS Combo 1（CCS1）规定，而不是许多50 Hz市场采用的IEC Type 2 / CCS2模式。此项应作为项目假设，而非一概而论的法律结论：出口商必须向ASEP、配电公司、场地方、招标文件或充电点运营商确认所需接口。IEC接口标准仍可作为尺寸互换性和直流耦合器族的有用参考。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬屬於60 Hz美洲市場電氣環境，因此公共及目的地交流充電較可能圍繞SAE J1772 Type 1規定，直流快充較可能圍繞CCS Combo 1（CCS1）規定，而不是許多50 Hz市場採用的IEC Type 2 / CCS2模式。此項應作為項目假設，而非一概而論的法律結論：出口商必須向ASEP、配電公司、場地方、招標文件或充電點運營商確認所需接口。IEC接口標準仍可作為尺寸互換性和直流耦合器族的有用參考。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — AC conductive charging coupler used in the Americas market
CCS Combo 1 / CCS1 — DC fast-charging connector used in the Americas market
IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories, including Type 1 and Type 2 families
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS configurations
Project-specific ASEP, distributor, owner, or CPO connector specification

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and DC connectors are physically incompatible with J1772 Type 1 and CCS1, and China DC fast charging uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS communication stack. A connector swap alone may not be enough for DC chargers because cable cooling, locking, insulation monitoring, PLC communication, labels, and test evidence may all change.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口在物理上与J1772 Type 1及CCS1不兼容，中国直流快充还采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS通信栈。对于直流充电桩，仅更换接口可能不足，因为电缆冷却、锁止、绝缘监测、PLC通信、标签和测试证据均可能改变。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口在物理上與J1772 Type 1及CCS1不兼容，中國直流快充還採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS通訊棧。對於直流充電樁，僅更換接口可能不足，因為電纜冷卻、鎖止、絕緣監測、PLC通訊、標籤和測試證據均可能改變。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for likely Panama deployments. Hardware conversion to J1772 Type 1 for AC and CCS1 for DC may be required, but the exact connector must be confirmed with the project authority. Redesign should cover coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity/control pilot signaling, DC communication, thermal rise, labels, spare parts, and test reports. GB/T-to-J1772 or GB/T-to-CCS1 adapters should not be treated as a conformity substitute for project-specified connector hardware.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩并不具备巴拿马可能部署场景下的接口就绪性。交流可能需要转换为J1772 Type 1，直流可能需要转换为CCS1，但具体接口必须由项目主管方确认。重新设计应覆盖耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近/控制导引信号、直流通信、温升、标签、备件及测试报告。GB/T转J1772或GB/T转CCS1转接器不应被视为项目指定接口硬件的合规替代。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁並不具備巴拿馬可能部署場景下的接口就緒性。交流可能需要轉換為J1772 Type 1，直流可能需要轉換為CCS1，但具體接口必須由項目主管方確認。重新設計應覆蓋耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近/控制導引信號、直流通訊、溫升、標籤、備件及測試報告。GB/T轉J1772或GB/T轉CCS1轉接器不應被視為項目指定接口硬體的合規替代。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — J1772 / CCS1 are likely practical connector expectations for an Americas 60 Hz market, but the exact connector must be confirmed with ASEP, distributor, tender, owner, or CPO before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not a physical substitute for J1772 / CCS1

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Use J1772 / CCS1 as the likely Americas-market starting point, but confirm the required connector with ASEP, the distributor, or the project owner. GB/T connectors cannot plug into J1772 or CCS1 inlets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。可将J1772 / CCS1作为美洲市场的可能起点，但必须向ASEP、配电公司或项目业主确认所需接口。GB/T接口无法插入J1772或CCS1车辆接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。可將J1772 / CCS1作為美洲市場的可能起點，但必須向ASEP、配電公司或項目業主確認所需接口。GB/T接口無法插入J1772或CCS1車輛接口。
